allow: Bash(python -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) items = [] for m in re.finditer\(r']+\\be-loop-item\\b[^>]*>\(.*?\)\(?=]+\\be-loop-item\\b|]+elementor-pagination|\\s*\\s*\\s*\\s*\)', html, re.DOTALL\): chunk = m.group\(1\) title_m = re.search\(r']*>.*?]*>\(.*?\)', chunk, re.DOTALL\) img_m = re.search\(r']+src=[\\"\\']\(https://[^\\"\\']+\)[\\"\\']\\s', chunk\) title = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', title_m.group\(1\)\).strip\(\) if title_m else '?' img = img_m.group\(1\).split\('/'\)[-1] if img_m else 'NO_IMG' items.append\(\(title, img\)\) print\(f'Page 2 items on live WordPress \({len\(items\)}\):'\) for i,\(t,img\) in enumerate\(items,1\): print\(f' {i}. [{t}] -> {img}'\) ")
